parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_LEADS_CHAT_ID, text: $json.telegram_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[{ text: 'В работу', callback_data: 'lead_status:in_progress:' + $json.lead_id }, { text: 'Ждем клиента', callback_data: 'lead_status:waiting_client:' + $json.lead_id }], [{ text: 'Закрыта', callback_data: 'lead_status:closed:' + $json.lead_id }, { text: 'Отказ', callback_data: 'lead_status:rejected:' + $json.lead_id }]] } } }}
